title: polyscias lydgatei
intro: Polyscias lydgatei, also known as the Hawaiian holly or lydgate's tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Araliaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Polyscias lydgatei include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and reduce inflammation. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by infusing its leaves in hot water to create a tea, or by using its roots to make a decoction, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
